title: FOOD PANTRY - 211info
text: HEREFORD HOUSE FOOD PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 3-5 day supply of food. May also offer personal hygiene items, blankets, and clothing when available. 7704 N Hereford Avenue Portland, OR 97203 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Friday-Saturday noon-2pm. Closed federal holidays and the Friday after Thanksgiving. Email (925) 989-9638 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Residential (925) 989-9638 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk, bike, or drive up for food. Call for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Friday noon-2pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Between N Willis and N Lombard. TriMet #35 on N Willis and #75 on N Lombard. Services: Bedding/Linen Food Pantries General Clothing Provision Personal/Grooming Supplies If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HEREFORD HOUSE
